description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to main and develop branches, on pull requests to those branches, on a scheduled cron job, and on workflow dispatch and call. The workflow has a concurrency group named pyngrok-singleton. It consists of four jobs: init to initialize test resources, validate using a reusable workflow, build with a matrix strategy across multiple OS and Python versions, and cleanup to prune test resources after the validate and build jobs.
